name: auth.consentApprove
description: Approve a pending consent request, granting the requested scopes to the requesting agent/client. This completes the device authorization flow.

user_code.description: The user-facing code displayed during device authorization (e.g., 'ABCD-EFGH'). Case-insensitive, hyphens optional.

approver.description: Identifier of the user approving the consent request.

roles.description: Optional roles to associate with the grant (e.g., ['admin', 'developer']).

mfa_verified.description: Whether the approver has completed multi-factor authentication for this approval.

errors.description: The specified user code does not exist.
The consent request has already been approved or denied.
Approval requires MFA verification but mfa_verified is false.
